boundary_binding.action_boundary: callback provenance current and matched to vendor master contact for the requested AP action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL confirms callback log is current, exact, and tied to the requested action, matching authorized contact, scope, and effective date. POL allows execution only when source records close the exact boundary. No open source defect remains.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: no open source-record defect remains in the packet
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CTL states callback log matches authorized contact and action; timing, scope, and authority are matched

critical_features_preserved: callback log must match authorized contact and action
final_answer: Source records close the exact boundary. CTL confirms the callback log is current, exact, and tied to the requested action, matching authorized contact, scope, and effective date. POL allows execution only when source records close the boundary, and BND directs decision from source-control records, not tone or urgency. No open source defect remains, so the action may proceed.
